before_sizes.source: pre-fix timeout triage measurement from current session before compaction

fix_direction: mechanically compact AllowedLocalSchemaCard and AllowedAPIContextCard under a character budget
shorten always-on Semantic IR planner rules while preserving source-safety terms
record prompt/card sizes in planner diagnostics and pre-call executor heartbeat
objective: Diagnose Qwen V2 focused-smoke timeout at compare_local_live_birthday_status.

root_cause_classification.reason: Heartbeat stopped before the LLM planner returned; pre-fix prompt+tool payload was about 32.2k characters. The relation/default guidance was present but small compared with always-on schema/API cards and rule payload.
